import subprocess, time, sys
cmd = ['bun','test','scripts/usage-report.test.ts','scripts/verify-m061-s01.test.ts','scripts/verify-m061-s02.test.ts','scripts/verify-m061-s03.test.ts','scripts/verify-m061-s04.test.ts','scripts/verify-m061-s05.test.ts']
start = time.perf_counter()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, text=True)
duration = int((time.perf_counter()-start)*1000)
print(f'EXIT_CODE={proc.returncode}')
print(f'DURATION_MS={duration}')
PY
